title: The Standing Stones
body: A circle of ancient stones pulses with residual magic. Runes carved into their faces depict a ritual you half-recognize from your studies. The air hums with potential.

choices.label: Attempt the ritual
choices.resultText: The magic responds. Power floods through your party — at a cost.

choices.label: Study the runes carefully
choices.resultText: Hours of study yield a fragment of lost knowledge. You feel sharper.

choices.label: Disturb nothing and leave
choices.resultText: Some doors are best left closed.

title: Voice in the Deep Wood
body: Something old speaks from the treeline — not in words, but in impressions. It is not hostile. It is curious. It has been watching your party for some time.

choices.label: Speak with it openly
choices.resultText: It shows you a safe path through the forest. The trees seem to part.

choices.label: Offer it something from your supplies
choices.resultText: It accepts. In return, it marks a cache of ancient coin.

choices.label: Ignore it and push on
choices.resultText: The presence follows for a while, then fades. The forest feels heavier afterward.

title: The Ruined Watchtower
body: The old watchtower's upper floors have collapsed, but the base is solid. From what remains of the staircase you can see clear to the horizon.

choices.label: Climb for a better view
choices.resultText: The climb is treacherous but worth it. You map the nearby terrain clearly.

choices.label: Search the base for useful debris
choices.resultText: Beneath old rubble: a lockbox with coin inside.

choices.label: Rest in the sheltered base
choices.resultText: The stone walls block the wind. You recover before pushing on.

title: Trapped Beneath the Stones
body: A hand reaches from beneath a fallen arch. An adventurer — alive, barely — trapped under rubble. They're carrying gear that looks expensive.

choices.label: Help them out — use full strength
choices.resultText: They're free. They press coin into your hand before staggering off.

choices.label: Help them out — take it slow
choices.resultText: A careful approach. They're grateful, and no one gets hurt.

choices.label: Take their gear first, then help
choices.resultText: They can't stop you. Afterwards they limp away without a word.

choices.label: Leave them
choices.resultText: You move on. You try not to think about the sound of them calling after you.
